title: geum × aurantiacum
intro: Geum × aurantiacum, a hybrid of the geum plant, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its bright yellow or orange flowers and feathery foliage. The medicinal properties of Geum × aurantiacum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and saponin content. The health benefits of consuming Geum × aurantiacum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary tract issues. Geum × aurantiacum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used fresh in herbal remedies, with its roots and leaves being the most commonly used parts of the plant.
